---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement to ds-mcp
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

> **Note:** If your request relates to the dspack file format or schema — for example, a new concept you want dspack to represent, or a change to how tokens, components, or patterns are structured — please open an issue in the [dspack repository](https://github.com/aestheticfunction/dspack) instead. Schema and format changes are out of scope for this repository.

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the context and why the current behavior is insufficient for your use case.

## Proposed solution

What change would address the problem? Be as specific as you can about what ds-mcp should do differently.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternatives you have considered or already tried, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else that may be relevant — MCP client you are using, the shape of your dspack file, or how you would use this in practice.
